NAVAREA XIX 100/19
ANDOYA

TEST FIRING FROM ANDOYA IN THE PERIOD FROM SEPT 23-27  2019
THE FIRING WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 1200 - 1800 UTC IN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD.
MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREA:

A 69-17,7N 016-01,2E
B 69-21,0N 015 43,0E
C 69-59,0N 015-25,0E
D 69-57,0N 014-38,0E
E 70-33,0N 014-13,0E
D 70-42,0N 016-28,0E
E 70-04,0N 016-38,0E
F 70-00,0N 015-54,0E
G 69-23,0N 016-15,0E

NOTE: SEE WWW.TESTSENTER.NO FOR DAILY UPDATES AND MAPS.
REFERS TO NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS WWW.KARTVERKET.NO/EFS/ 17-2019
